goal: Make v0 release blocker recertification summaries explicitly report blocking reasons and operator next actions while preserving the current NOT_GO release gate.
head: ea097e3
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update the local v0 release blocker recertification summary contract so NOT_GO outputs contain explicit blocking_reasons and operator_next_actions, focused recertification tests, refreshed current NOT_GO review artifacts, LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
required_evidence: Recertification summary includes blocking_reasons and operator_next_actions for current NOT_GO states.
Focused recertification tests verify actionable summaries for current expected NOT_GO and failed child command paths.
Host-access recertification refresh remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker.
No release GO is claimed from current local artifacts.
warnings: The current host still lacks real trained adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.
This gate improves recertification diagnostics only; it does not accept evidence or relax readiness.

phase_notes.plan: Add explicit blocking_reasons and operator_next_actions to run_v0_release_blocker_recertification.py summaries.
phase_notes.audit: The recertification script currently records current_state and a one-line operator_next_step, but top-level NOT_GO output does not enumerate actionable blocker categories.
phase_notes.build: Patch recertification summary helper logic, focused tests, docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, completion log, and refresh current NOT_GO artifacts.
phase_notes.check: Run focused recertification tests, py_compile, host-access current NOT_GO recertification, JSON validation, search evidence, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this recertification diagnostics phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Local v0 release blocker recertification actionable NOT_GO summary, focused recertification tests, refreshed current NOT_GO review artifacts, LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.

pabcd.audit: The recertification script currently records current_state and a one-line operator_next_step, but top-level NOT_GO output does not enumerate actionable blocker categories.
